title: Support different pull directions on different bits

features.name: pullup on single bit of multi-bit wire
features.description: Code should include a pullup directive applied to a single bit select of a multi-bit wire

features.name: pulldown on single bit of multi-bit wire
features.description: Code should include a pulldown directive applied to a single bit select of a multi-bit wire

features.name: different pull directions on different bits of same wire
features.description: Code should include both pullup and pulldown directives applied to different bit selects of the same multi-bit wire
